reviews.comment:
Hace 2 semanas tuve q parar en la gasolineria YPF, para poder seguir mi recorrido rural por la mesopotamia, paré logicamente por nafta y baño... Espere más de media hora por ambos!!!! IMPOSIBLE.... Vayan a la Shell, q esta a penas unas cuadras de distancia, no fui pero a lo mejor son más rapidos y sobretodo más amables.

(Translated by Google)
Two weeks ago I had to stop at the YPF gas station to continue my rural road trip through Mesopotamia. I stopped, of course, for gas and a restroom... I waited over half an hour for both! IMPOSSIBLE... Go to the Shell station, which is just a few blocks away. I didn't go, but maybe they're faster and, above all, friendlier.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12844074835254669240/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5dGZ2YXlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hoy el personal que me atendió es mal educado irrespetuoso, y ante una simple pregunta responde para que lo hace si no sabe , creo que debe informar con amabilidad y no de mala gana,

(Translated by Google)
Today the staff who attended me was rude and disrespectful, and when I asked a simple question they responded, "Why do you do that if you don't know?" I think they should inform you kindly and not reluctantly.

There's Wi-Fi and a TV.
